title: 秋華賞の後に・絶えず前へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has given it her all, giving an earnest
performance that the audience will never forget.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the results, it wasn't a perfect race. I
wasn't able to secure the honor of getting all
three Tiaras.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But this is who I am right now. I have to accept my
present condition and use it as fuel to take on
new challenges tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I have no time to sit around moping.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Undaunted." That's the word that comes to mind
when I look at Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't let any result break her. She keeps
looking forward to continue challenging herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's what it means to be Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We return to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober? Is everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for barging in on you like this. I just wanted
to say, you were great out there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And there's something else I just have to tell
you...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Go on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I watched you as you faced every race of the
Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I watched you chase your ideal and continue to
take on challenge after challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And through all that... you taught me something.
Not with words, but with the way you race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep pushing ever forward... just like
you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I just... I needed to tell you that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You've really grown, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue to challenge myself so that I don't
lose to you one day. Which is why you need to
keep working hard too, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, I will! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm honestly very happy right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I have. It's rather a sobering experience.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I hope you continue to stick with me. Starting
tomorrow, we aim for even greater heights!
